title: CUQOO 1L Scented Citronella Oil for Garden Burners - 2 Pack Insect-Repelling Torch & Lantern Oil Outdoor Use, Garden Citronella for Tiki Torches, Burners & Lamps, Patios, BBQs, Camping
features: 𝐂𝐔𝐐𝐎𝐎 𝐂𝐈𝐓𝐑𝐎𝐍𝐄𝐋𝐋𝐀 𝐋𝐀𝐌𝐏 𝐎𝐈𝐋 – Elevate your outdoor ambiance with CUQOO citronella torch oil, perfect for topping up your lantern torches or garden burners. Its high-quality formulation ensures a consistent performance, enhancing the atmosphere for your gatherings and outdoor activities.

𝐍𝐀𝐓𝐔𝐑𝐀𝐋 𝐄𝐗𝐓𝐑𝐀𝐂𝐓𝐒 - Our citronella oil insect repellant is made from citronella extracts, making it 100% natural. This smokeless oil is suitable for all types of wicks, ensuring a clean and efficient burn without compromising air quality. Enjoy the natural scent and the peace of mind that comes with using a safe, eco-friendly product.

𝐈𝐍𝐒𝐄𝐂𝐓 𝐑𝐄𝐏𝐄𝐋𝐋𝐀𝐍𝐓 – Say goodbye to small biting insects with CUQOO citronella oil for garden burners. Proven to effectively repel pests, this oil helps create a more comfortable outdoor environment. Whether you're hosting a barbecue or relaxing in your garden, our citronella lamp oil ensures you can enjoy your time outdoors without the annoyance of insects.

𝐏𝐑𝐄𝐌𝐈𝐔𝐌 𝐁𝐔𝐑𝐍𝐄𝐑 – Experience a superior burn with our high-quality natural extracts. Follow the manufacturer’s instructions, do not overfill, and allow 5 minutes for the wick to absorb the oil before lighting. Monitor the flame and adjust the wick if necessary to prevent smoke or soot. Never leave burning lamps unattended. Ideal for oil lamps, tiki torches, and garden torches.
description: Product Description Previous page Next page Why choose CUQOO Citronella Oil for Garden Burners? Made with natural extracts and n-paraffin, CUQOO citronella oil burns cleanly while repelling insects—perfect for creating a pest-free, relaxing outdoor atmosphere. Why does black smoke sometimes appear? Black smoke typically occurs when the wick is too high or the burner is not cleaned regularly. Keeping the burner clean and using a low flame helps reduce smoke and soot build-up. Does the bottle include a pouring nozzle? Yes! The bottle is equipped with a built-in precision pouring nozzle. This makes it easy to pour directly into burners or torches without the mess—no funnel needed, and less chance of spillage. Does this citronella oil produce a lot of smoke when used? The oil is designed for cleaner burning, but smoke levels can vary depending on the burner and wick height. For minimal smoke, ensure the wick is trimmed and the flame is kept low and steady.
